name: Dynamics 365 Contact Center (Executive Roll-up)
description: Cross-manager aggregation layer over Dynamics 365 Contact Center. Roll-up service level, agent occupancy, and queue health across all four manager-led teams — the cross-team correlation Dynamics 365 cannot natively produce.

name: Dynamics 365 Workforce Management
description: Director-level forecasting, capacity modeling, agent skill profiles, and cross-team scheduling. Powers what-if scenarios for cross-queue agent reallocation and overtime trajectory forecasting.

name: Migration PMO Tracker
description: Genesys-to-Dynamics 365 migration program management. Phase milestones, parity testing status, IVR routing flow validation, and SI partner deliverables. Cross-referenced with Dynamics 365 + Genesys runtime data to surface migration risk in operational terms.

name: Genesys Cloud (Legacy — Migration Bridge)
description: On-premise legacy CCaaS in active migration. Continues to handle Mortgage Servicing and Escalations queues. Configuration export feeds parity testing for Phase 2 IVR cutover. License expiration tracked against Phase 3 timeline.

name: Budget & Financial Planning System
description: Q2 operating budget, cost-per-contact roll-up, overtime spend trajectory, vendor & SI partner billing. Cross-referenced with HR overtime data and Dynamics 365 volume metrics to project budget burn against operational outcomes.

name: HR System / Vendor Management
description: Agent attrition, exit interview themes, leave-of-absence tracking, and vendor/SI partner contracts. Feeds attrition trend lines for executive reporting and SI partner accountability for migration delivery.

name: Marketing Cloud
description: Campaign launches and promotional volume drivers. Cross-correlated with queue spikes to attribute service level impacts to upstream marketing activity — root-cause visibility unavailable inside Dynamics 365 alone.

name: CRM (Member 360)
description: Member-level interaction history, satisfaction surveys, sentiment, and complaint records. Powers CSAT roll-up and member experience reporting for monthly leadership reviews.

name: Microsoft Fabric
description: Tenant-specific unified data analytics platform fed by CCAS. Hosts the historical data lake, Power BI foundation, and AI/ML model registry. Radiant intelligence layer queries Fabric for enriched cross-source correlation across all four teams.

name: Variant WFM / Call Recording
description: Workforce management schedules, force-to-load ratios, agent shift state, call recording metadata, and call reason codes (first/second reason). Critical for cross-team staffing-to-queue correlation during enterprise incidents.

name: Voice Bio System
description: Voice authentication enrollment, biometric match confidence, fraud detection flags. Feeds enterprise authentication posture metrics and fallback verification triggers when PinDrop degrades.

name: PinDrop
description: Call authentication scoring, spoofing detection, ANI reputation, carrier intelligence, geo-risk signals. Critical for identifying security posture changes during SIP path degradation.

name: Carrier Intelligence
description: SIP path health, carrier status feeds, fiber/circuit incident reports, and estimated recovery timelines. Enables root-cause identification for infrastructure-driven service degradation at the executive roll-up level.

name: Dynamics 365 IVR / Self-Service
description: Real-time intent capture, self-service completion rates by intent, containment metrics, transfer-out reason codes. Feeds top-intent indicators across all dashboard tiers and powers the IVR template hot-swap path.
